errors.name: inconsistent-overload
errors.description:
Implementation signature `(self: Self@NamedArray, axes: Axis | Mapping[str, int | None] | Sequence[AxisSelector] | str) -> Axis | Mapping[str, int] | Sequence[Axis]` does not accept all arguments that overload signature `(self: Self@NamedArray, axis: Axis | str) -> Axis` accepts

errors.name: bad-override
errors.description:
Class member `NamedArray.__eq__` overrides parent class `object` in an inconsistent manner
  `NamedArray.__eq__` has type `(self: NamedArray, other: Unknown) -> Literal[False] | NamedArray | Unknown`, which is not assignable to `(self: NamedArray, value: object, /) -> bool`, the type of `object.__eq__`
  Signature mismatch:
  expected: def __eq__(self: NamedArray, value: object, /) -> bool: ...
                                         ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^     ^^^^ return type
                                         |
                                         parameters
  found:    def __eq__(self: NamedArray, other: Unknown) -> Literal[False] | NamedArray | Unknown: ...
                                         ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ return type
                                         |
                                         parameters
errors.concise_description: Class member `NamedArray.__eq__` overrides parent class `object` in an inconsistent manner

                                         parameters
errors.concise_description: Class member `NamedArray.__ne__` overrides parent class `object` in an inconsistent manner

errors.name: bad-override
errors.description:
Class member `Gemma3Config.model_type` overrides parent class `Gemma2Config` in an inconsistent manner
  Property getter for `Gemma3Config.model_type` has type `(self: Gemma3Config) -> type[Gemma3LMHeadModel]`, which is not assignable to `(self: Gemma3Config) -> type[Gemma2LMHeadModel]`, the property getter for `Gemma2Config.model_type`
  Signature mismatch:
  expected: def model_type(self: Gemma3Config) -> type[Gemma2LMHeadModel]: ...
                                                            ^ return type
  found:    def model_type(self: Gemma3Config) -> type[Gemma3LMHeadModel]: ...
                                                            ^ return type

errors.name: bad-override
errors.description:
Class member `ArrowFlightServer.get_metrics` overrides parent class `WeightTransferServer` in an inconsistent manner
  `ArrowFlightServer.get_metrics` has type `(self: ArrowFlightServer) -> WeightTransferServerMetrics`, which is not assignable to `(self: ArrowFlightServer) -> dict[Unknown, Unknown]`, the type of `WeightTransferServer.get_metrics`
  Signature mismatch:
  expected: def get_metrics(self: ArrowFlightServer) -> dict[Unknown, Unknown]: ...
                                                        ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ return type
  found:    def get_metrics(self: ArrowFlightServer) -> WeightTransferServerMetrics: ...
                                                        ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ return type
errors.concise_description: Class member `ArrowFlightServer.get_metrics` overrides parent class `WeightTransferServer` in an inconsistent manner

errors.name: bad-override
errors.description:
Class member `ArrowFlightServer.get_debug_snapshot` overrides parent class `WeightTransferServer` in an inconsistent manner
  `ArrowFlightServer.get_debug_snapshot` has type `(self: ArrowFlightServer) -> Mapping[str, object]`, which is not assignable to `(self: ArrowFlightServer) -> dict[str, object]`, the type of `WeightTransferServer.get_debug_snapshot`
  Signature mismatch:
  expected: def get_debug_snapshot(self: ArrowFlightServer) -> dict[str, object]: ...
                                                               ^^^^ return type
  found:    def get_debug_snapshot(self: ArrowFlightServer) -> Mapping[str, object]: ...
                                                               ^^^^^^^ return type
errors.concise_description: Class member `ArrowFlightServer.get_debug_snapshot` overrides parent class `WeightTransferServer` in an inconsistent manner
